response:
The case decided first is **Reynolds v. Sims**. 

This is because the context explicitly states:  
*"Reynolds v. Sims... was a United States Supreme Court case... [and] the case was brought on behalf of voters in Alabama by M.O. Sims...".*  
This indicates that **Reynolds v. Sims** was decided before **Selle v. Gibb**, which was decided in 1984.
